title: crepis gaubae
intro: Crepis gaubae, also known as Korean rockcress or creeping hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Crepis gaubae is believed to have several health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and reducing symptoms of fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed in Korea and other parts of Asia to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
